Pattaraporn Tulathum

f.pattaraporn.t@gmail.com

I am currently a Ph.D. student in Robotics Laboratory, Nara Institute of Science and Technology (NAIST). My research interests include service robots and autonomous system.

Experience

Research Assistant

Nara Institute of Science and Technology, Japan

I'm currently assisting professors to do robotic researches.

June 2018 - Present

Curriculum Designer

Learn Corporation, Thailand

I worked in Business Development position and focused on design python programming language curriculum for teachers and students in the schools.

Teacher Assistant

Kasetsart University, Thailand

I worked as a teacher assistant in Information Technology for Engineering students.

Teacher Assistant

Kasetsart University, Thailand

I worked as a teacher assistant in Computer and Programming for Engineering students.

June 2014 - May 2017

Exchange Student

Tamagawa University, Japan

I participated in Japan-Asia Youth Exchange Program in Science at Tamagawa University (Tokyo, Japan). I have learned about ROS and used the TurtleBot robot platform with Python programming language.

January 2017

Exhibitor in CP InnoExpo 2016

Skuba Team

The Skuba, robotic team, and I was exhibitors in the CP Innovation Expo 2016. Also, we were able to see many interesting innovations and technology in this event.

Student Internship

CT Asia Robotic

I developed Face detection and recognition program for the Dinsaw Mini Robot by using C++ program language on QT Creater editor.
